fields.label: Channel Code
fields.description: e.g. WA_ORDERS, WA_RECOVERY, WA_DISPATCH, WA_ENGAGE. Used in routing — never change after setup.

fields.label: Display Name
fields.description: e.g. VitalVida Orders, VitalVida Offers, VitalVida Dispatch, VitalVida Care

fields.label: Purpose
fields.options:
Customer Notifications
Abandoned Cart Recovery
Delivery Agent Ops
Customer Service & Broadcast

fields.label: Default Fallback
fields.description: If a message type has no route, use this channel as fallback. Only one channel should be default.

fields.label: Phone Number
fields.description: The WhatsApp number for this channel. Format: 2348XXXXXXXXX

fields.label: Sender Name
fields.description: Display name in WhatsApp e.g. VitalVida Orders

fields.label: API Username / Email
fields.description: eBulkSMS: account email. Meta: not needed.

fields.label: API Key / Token
fields.description: eBulkSMS: API key. Meta: bearer token. Never logged.

fields.label: API Base URL
fields.description: Override if provider URL changes. Default: https://api.ebulksms.com

fields.label: Daily Message Limit
fields.description: 0 = unlimited. Set per your eBulkSMS plan.

fields.label: Owner Team
fields.description: e.g. Sales, Logistics, Customer Service, Marketing
